name: ship's hold
hints: The ship's hold has an alarm clock and a sign. Both may be useful.
GET CLOCK and READ SIGN. The alarm clock can wake things up. The sign has important information.
GET ALARM CLOCK (useful for waking the sleeping pirate) and READ SIGN for clues. WEST goes through the crawlway (room 20) back to the smuggler's hold.
Take the alarm clock to wake the sleeping pirate on the hilltop. WEST through the crawlway leads back to the treasure room.
notes: Ship's hold containing an alarm clock and a sign. The alarm clock is key for waking the sleeping pirate on the hilltop (room 7). WEST goes through the narrow crawlway (room 20) to the smuggler's hold/treasure room (room 13).
